Variables.Name: Position
Variables.Description: The position of the point attractor from the source of the emitter.

Variables.Name: Range
Variables.Description: The radial range of the attractor.

Variables.Name: Strength
Variables.Description: The strength of the point attractor.

Variables.Name: StrengthByDistance
Variables.Description: The strength curve is a function of distance or of time.

Variables.Name: bAffectBaseVelocity
Variables.Description: If true, the velocity adjustment will be applied to the base velocity.

Variables.Name: bUseWorldSpacePosition
Variables.Description: If true, treat the position as world space.  So don't transform the the point to localspace.

Variables.Name: Positive_X
Variables.Description: Whether particles can move along the positive X axis.

Variables.Name: Positive_Y
Variables.Description: Whether particles can move along the positive Y axis.

Variables.Name: Positive_Z
Variables.Description: Whether particles can move along the positive Z axis.

Variables.Name: Negative_X
Variables.Description: Whether particles can move along the negative X axis.

Variables.Name: Negative_Y
Variables.Description: Whether particles can move along the negative Y axis.

Variables.Name: Negative_Z
Variables.Description: Whether particles can move along the negative Z axis.
